title: Explosive Villager
description: ✘ Take the villager in your hands and shoot.
body:
[Russian review on YouTube](https://youtu.be/EEgwYs0fKXc?si=BvMJHN9FivdpN5B5)

**You can now take a villager in your hand, draw it like an arrow and shoot it. When colliding with blocks, the villager will explode.**

---

**My project is stopped by moderation again, I'm tired of it. I don't understand what's unclear, I wrote it in Russian through a translator, We take a resident with RMB and throw, Resident - explodes.**
(the fact that I accidentally didn't indicate that the mod is also needed on the server is my fault, although it is logical.)

![ev](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9253393b04495497c3effadd4c29478145aaa622.gif)

**We can arrange to order a mod at Discord, my nickname is Gvoper**
